calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,300p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && sed -n '1,240p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73281394 --event evt-petition-disposition && find data/cases/scotus/73281394 -maxdepth 6 -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73281394 --event evt-petition-disposition\nfind data/cases/scotus/73281394 -maxdepth 8 -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73281394/events/evt-petition-disposition/event.yaml\nsed -n '1,320p' data/cases/scotus/73281394/record/snapshots/2026-07-16.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,260p' data/cases/scotus/73281394/record/documents/documents.json\nwc -l -w -c data/cases/scotus/73281394/record/documents/questions-presented.txt data/cases/scotus/73281394/record/documents/petition.txt data/cases/scotus/73281394/record/documents/brief-in-opposition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,220p' data/cases/scotus/73281394/record/documents/questions-presented.txt\nsed -n '1,620p' data/cases/scotus/73281394/record/documents/petition.txt\nsed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73281394/record/documents/brief-in-opposition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":50000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n \"^Argument|Lower courts are split|ideal vehicle|profound national|CONCLUSION|REASONS FOR DENYING|jurisdiction|split|vehicle|importance|QUESTION PRESENTED|STATEMENT\" data/cases/scotus/73281394/record/documents/petition.txt data/cases/scotus/73281394/record/documents/brief-in-opposition.txt | head -n 160\nsed -n '250,620p' data/cases/scotus/73281394/record/documents/petition.txt\nsed -n '1,88p' data/cases/scotus/73281394/record/documents/brief-in-op

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '453,820p' data/cases/scotus/73281394/record/documents/petition.txt\nsed -n '1,220p' data/cases/scotus/73281394/record/context.json\nrg -n \"Modern discretionary-cert petitions|Segment base rate by salience band|relist|CVSG|originating circuit|Term\" metrics/statpack.md | head -n 100","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,175p' metrics/statpack.md\nsed -n '175,280p' metrics/statpack.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":22000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"jq 'keys' metrics/statpack.json\njq '.scotus_cert_by_term // .cert_by_term // .terms // empty' metrics/statpack.json | head -n 240\njq '.. | objects | select(has(\"term\") and (.term == \"2025\" or .Term == \"2025\"))' metrics/statpack.json | head -n 240","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n \"fedcourts query|--court|--docket|--event|--text|--limit|--era\" docs/cli.md | head -n 120\nsed -n '1,240p' docs/cli.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":24000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --court scotus --topic \"juvenile life without parole\" --limit 5\nUV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --court scotus --citation \"Jones v. Mississippi\" --limit 5","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const matches = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|citation|search/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description)); text(matches);

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"\"juvenile\" \"life without parole\" corrigible Jones",court:["scotus","ca2","ca3","ca9","utah"],filed_before:"2026-07-17",fields:["caseName","court","dateFiled","citation","absolute_url","snippet"],order_by:"score desc",num_results:8}); for (const c of (r?.content||[])) c.type==="image" ? image(c) : c.type==="text" ? text(c.text) : null;

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"\"transient immaturity\" \"life without parole\"",filed_before:"2026-07-17",fields:["caseName","court","dateFiled","citation","absolute_url","snippet"],order_by:"score desc",num_results:10}); for (const c of (r?.content||[])) c.type==="image" ? image(c) : c.type==="text" ? text(c.text) : null;

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"\"vacated\" \"sentence\" \"final judgment\" \"1257\" resentencing",filed_before:"2026-07-17",fields:["caseName","court","dateFiled","citation","absolute_url"],order_by:"score desc",num_results:8}); for (const c of (r?.content||[])) c.type==="image" ? image(c) : c.type==="text" ? text(c.text) : null;

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ\nls -ld data/cases/scotus/73281394/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T000329Z 2>/dev/null || true","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":2000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"mkdir -p data/cases/scotus/73281394/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T000329Z","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":2000}); text(r.output)

const patch = "*** Begin Patch

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts validate data
git status --short
find data/cases/scotus/73281394/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T000329Z -maxdepth 1 -type f -printf '%f\n' | sort
jq -e . data/cases/scotus/73281394/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T000329Z/prediction.json >/dev/null
jq -e . data/cases/scotus/73281394/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-base

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"git status --short --untracked-files=all | sed -n '1,120p'\ngh issue comment 722 --body 'Prediction cell codex-baseline/20260717T000329Z completed and validated. Forecast: denial, with a 4% probability of any grant.
